title: euonymus schensianus
intro: Euonymus schensianus, also known as Spindle Tree, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Euonymus schensianus include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal extract.
